Slope Stage Scanner

90-day Trendline  |  Stages 0-3  |  Data as of 2026-03-17 08:01 ET  |  market-dashboards
Dashboard Archive: 2026-03-17 Home
About This Dashboard
What It Does
Classifies 1,300+ assets into 4 market stages using 90-day linear regression slope: Deep Decline (<-30%), Basing (-30% to +10%), Sustained Uptrend (+10% to +80%), and Parabolic (>+80%). Entry signals fire on Stage 1->2 transitions. Includes crash risk, R-squared trend quality, and distance from trendline.
For educational and informational purposes only. Not financial advice. Past performance does not guarantee future results.
